response_update_notes.landscape: Agent provided specific new details (pale sandy-beige soil, extreme openness) that strengthened the Turkey hypothesis.

verdict.judge_question_strategy_notes: The judge correctly identified that the initial assessments were generic and needed specific differentiating details. The questions targeted the exact agents (meta, landscape, botanics) that had the relevant evidence to distinguish Turkey from the other candidates (Greece, Bulgaria, Spain).
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge effectively synthesized the specific infrastructure details from the meta agent and the vegetation/soil details from the landscape agent to confidently select Turkey, correctly weighing these specific cues over the generic similarities to other regions.
verdict.discussion_convergence_notes: The discussion successfully eliminated ambiguity. The agents moved from medium/low confidence in alternatives to high confidence in Turkey based on specific, image-grounded details provided in response to the judge's questions.
